name: Skillet Chicken'n' Noodles
recipeIngredient: 5 5/8 oz chicken flavor ramen noodle soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions. Add seasoning packets and sour cream. Drain most liquid; set aside.
2. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook chicken and onions in hot oil until chicken is no longer pink and onions are tender.
3. Stir in tomato soup, water, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and black pepper.
4. Stir in reserved noodles. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
